title: Add LND Ai text to image to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [LND Ai text to image](https://www.namansoni.in/text-to-image) to image
- Generate images from text with LND Ai text to image using z image turbo by pollination ai; free to use with no signup.

Fixes #9196

gist.headline: LND AI joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app blooms in our community garden! LND AI is a slick new text-to-image generator powered by Pollinations, completely free with no signup needed.
gist.summary: Added the community-built LND AI text-to-image generator to the apps showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover LND AI in the community directory, offering free, no-signup image generation powered by Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new addition to the greenhouse. Since it's a text-to-image app, Polly could be wearing a painter's beret and painting on a digital canvas next to a retro computer.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, happily painting a landscape on a digital canvas easel inside a lush greenhouse. A chunky retro computer monitor nearby displays text prompts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and inviting.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, happily painting a landscape on a digital canvas easel inside a lush greenhouse. A chunky retro computer monitor nearby displays text prompts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
